title: solidago virgaurea subsp. caucasica
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. caucasica, commonly known as Caucasian goldenrod, is a subspecies of the Solidago virgaurea plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Caucasian goldenrod include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in poultices or compresses for topical applications.
